name: Mental Health First Aid
listingIntro: This FREE 8-hour course teaches individuals how to recognize signs of mental health or substance use challenges, how to offer and provide initial help, and how to guide a person toward appropriate care. Please complete this form if you are interested in the mental health first-aid training session.
Be mindful that this training will require 2 hours of pre-work and 6 hours of a virtual instructor-led training.
Attendance of the full session is mandatory for certification. Certification lasts for 3 years.
Complete the training and receive a $100 gift card (as funding allows)!
